name: XM1014 | 埋葬之影
descriptionEn: The XM1014 is a powerful fully automatic shotgun that justifies its heftier price tag with the ability to paint a room with lead fast. Entombed for millennia, this recently unearthed XM-1014 has been custom painted with blue wraps and Egyptian accents. Fit for a pharaoh
descriptionZh: XM1014 是一把强大的全自动霰弹枪，其高昂的价格赋予了它高射速和室内清剿的能力。 该武器已被埋葬千年，这款近期出土的 XM-1014 采用了埃及元素进行点缀，枪的部分采用蓝色包裹。 法老的绝配
